allow: Bash(python -c "import json; data = json.load\(open\('examples/smoke-specs/spec-smoke-01.json'\)\); scenarios = data.get\('scenarioBatch', {}\).get\('scenarios', []\); print\('Scenario IDs:', [s.get\('scenarioId'\) for s in scenarios]\)")
Bash(python -c "import json; data = json.load\(open\('examples/mocks/spec-smoke-01.sonnet.json'\)\); content = data.get\('content', []\); print\(json.dumps\(data, indent=2\)[:3000]\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; data = json.load\(open\('examples/mocks/cast-validate.sonnet.json'\)\); sb = data.get\('scenarioBatch', {}\); print\('batchId:', sb.get\('batchId'\)\); print\('Scenario IDs:', [s.get\('scenarioId'\) for s in sb.get\('scenarios', []\)]\)")
Bash(timeout 120 bash -c 'while ! dotnet test --no-build 2>&1 | grep -q "Test Run"; do sleep 5; done')
